title: microsemma ciliaris
intro: Microsemma ciliaris, also known as "Pilocarpus ciliare", is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, commonly referred to as a type of Rutaceae shrub native to South America. The medicinal properties of Microsemma ciliaris include its ability to exhibit antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with the plant include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and aid in digestion. Microsemma ciliaris is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can be used to treat various health conditions when administered under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
